reviews.comment:
Pasamos a cargar nafta mientras que estábamos de paseo, principalmente porque son de la ACA y resultó que no tenían sistema. El no tenía sistema impacta directamente en no poder recibir los descuentos disponibles y en tener que elegir otro medio de pago ya que tampoco tenían disponible la app de YPF.

Seguir los chicos está es una situación que tienen desde el 1 de diciembre y que es lo mismo en todo el país. Lo cual, pudimos verificar que no era así ya que dentro del mismo periodo pudimos acceder a los beneficios en otras estaciones de servicios.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to fill up while we were out for a drive, mainly because they're ACA stations, and it turned out their system was down. The system being down directly impacted our ability to receive available discounts and forced us to choose another payment method since the YPF app wasn't working either.

We're following the guys, this situation has been ongoing since December 1st and is the same throughout the country. However, we were able to verify that this wasn't the case, as we were able to access the benefits at other service stations during the same period.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCaWNEOTZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ubicada en sobre la Ruta 38 esquina avenida Edén. Paramos solamente a cargar nafta, no nos dieron ticket, ni tampoco nos sumaron puntos de ServiClub porque no les andaba el sistema, lo cual no es la primera vez qué ocurre.
Pretendimos tomar un café en el bar. Una señorita muy amable me informó que ya estaba cerrado pero tuvo la deferencia de indicarme un bar próximo donde tomamos un excelente café. Califico solamente con
3 estrellas porque me parece que, un día domingo fin de semana largo, muy desconsiderado cerrar el bar  temprano, cuando la gente está volviendo y no obtener el ticket correspondiente ni sumar los puntos  por la carga de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Located on Route 38 at the corner of Edén Avenue. We only stopped to fill up with gas; they didn't give us a receipt, nor did they credit our ServiClub points because their system wasn't working, which isn't the first time this has happened.
We wanted to have a coffee at the bar. A very kind young woman informed me that it was already closed but was kind enough to point me to a nearby bar where we had an excellent coffee. I'm only giving it 3 stars because I think it's very inconsiderate to close the bar early on a Sunday during a long weekend, when people are returning home, and not give us a receipt or credit our points for the fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCZ1ByTHdRRRAB
